name: Championship Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pecans (toasted in a 350°F (180°C) oven for 8 minutes and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on the countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix in flour, salt, and baking soda with the creamed mixture until just combined. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Form rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough into balls. Roll each ball in chopped pecans. Place cookies 3 inches (7 cm) apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time for 8 to 10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies. Do not overbake. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before removing them to foil to cool completely. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
